values.content:
Extract structured grant data from search results. Return ONLY valid JSON:
{"grants":[{"name":"string","funder":"string|null","deadline":"YYYY-MM-DD|null","amount":"string|null","eligibility":"string|null","summary":"string|null","url":"string|null","confidence":0.0}]}

Rules:
- deadline must be ISO date or null
- confidence 0-1
- Only extract real grant opportunities
